source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for alerting and incident UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for headings, body, labels, and numerals.
layout: Stacked storm-sky panels, sharp lightning focus states, dense alert tables, and legible escalation surfaces.

prompts.label: Transparent thundercloud motif source
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a thundercloud motif with slate grey cloud mass, electric yellow lightning, rain blue lower streaks, and storm-front shape, isolated full subject, no text.
Subject: A compact anvil thundercloud with layered storm texture, one crisp lightning branch, rain veil details, and dramatic but clean silhouette.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop the cloud, lightning, or rain streaks.
Lighting/mood: charged storm light, alerting-system mood, natural slate and electric contrast.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be uniform with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no city, no landscape, no people, no extra storms, no text, no watermark, no decorative background.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Thundercloud" derived from the visible transparent thundercloud motif.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from slate grey cloud forms, electric yellow lightning, rain blue, and storm-front layering. This light board is the primary reference for coding any future theme.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board.
Required visible sections: Morphous Thundercloud, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples with Geist and Noto Sans JP guidance.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command, sidebar navigation, alert metric cards, incident charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, precise grid, 8px card radius, storm-shelf dividers, high-legibility alert states.
Constraints: no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple gradients, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Thundercloud".

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the visible Morphous Thundercloud design-system board. It must feel like the same system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible transparent thundercloud motif and the visible light-mode board as references. Preserve slate grey structure, electric yellow alert language, rain blue context, storm-front texture, spacing, Japanese typography, and shadcn/tweakcn component coverage. This dark board is the companion reference for coding any future theme.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board.
Required visible sections: Morphous Thundercloud, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Visual details: storm core background, pale cloud text, electric yellow primary accents, rain blue secondary accents, slate cards, sharp focus states, crisp controls.
Constraints: no neon overload, no unrelated saturated colors, no flat pure-black-only background, no illegible text, no random brand names.
